hero_subtitle: Experience modern online chess battles with realtime transmission, FIDE standard Elo ratings, and tactical analysis forums.
features_subtitle: Designed for players of all skill levels — from casual matches to ranked tournament play.
feat_stomp_desc: Low latency match connections using WebSockets and automated message relays.
feat_elo_desc: Accurate FIDE-based Elo ratings to track your skill progression.
feat_forum_desc: Share strategy articles, analyze classic games, and connect with the community.
cta_ready_desc: Create a Chess Arena account or play instantly as a Guest to start your first battle.
